---
title: "Multiverse Analysis"
author: "Erin M. Buchanan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, size="scriptsize", message = F)
def.chunk.hook <- knitr::knit_hooks$get("chunk")
knitr::knit_hooks$set(chunk = function(x, options) {
  x <- def.chunk.hook(x, options)
  ifelse(options$size != "normalsize", paste0("\\", options$size,"\n\n", x, "\n\n \\normalsize"), x)
})
```

## Libraries

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
```

## Functions

### Participants

```{r}
mark_participant_exclusions <- function(data,
                                        acc_cut = NULL,
                                        min_trials = NULL,
                                        perf_percent = NULL,
                                        rtvar_percent = NULL) {
  
  exclude <- rep(FALSE, nrow(data))
  
  if (!is.null(acc_cut)) {
    exclude <- exclude | data$p_correct < acc_cut
  }
  
  if (!is.null(min_trials)) {
    exclude <- exclude | data$n_trials < min_trials
  }
  
  if (!is.null(perf_percent)) {
    exclude <- exclude | data$perf_rank <= perf_percent
  }
  
  if (!is.null(rtvar_percent)) {
    exclude <- exclude | data$rt_rank <= rtvar_percent
  }
  
  return(exclude)
}
```

### Trials

```{r}
mark_trial_exclusions <- function(data,
                                  rt_min = NULL,
                                  rt_max = NULL,
                                  lower_bound = NULL, 
                                  upper_bound = NULL) {
  exclude <- rep(FALSE, nrow(data))
  
  # Absolute RT bounds
  if (!is.null(rt_min) && !is.null(rt_max)) {
    exclude <- exclude |
      data$original_duration < rt_min |
      data$original_duration > rt_max |
      is.na(data$original_duration)
  }
  
  # Percentile-based bounds
  if (!is.null(lower_bound) && !is.null(upper_bound)) {
    exclude <- exclude |
      data$rt_trial_rank < lower_bound |
      data$rt_trial_rank > upper_bound |
      is.na(data$original_duration)
  }
  
  return(exclude)
}
```

### Stimuli

```{r}
mark_stimulus_exclusions <- function(data,
                                     min_item_n = NULL,
                                     min_item_acc = NULL,
                                     min_item_rank = NULL) {
  exclude <- rep(FALSE, nrow(data))
  
  if (!is.null(min_item_n)) {
    exclude <- exclude | data$n_item_correct < min_item_n
  }
  
  if (!is.null(min_item_acc)) {
    exclude <- exclude | data$p_item_correct < min_item_acc
  }
  
  if (!is.null(min_item_rank)) {
    exclude <- exclude | data$item_rank <= min_item_rank
  }
  
  return(exclude)
}

# Wrapper functions for grid loop
apply_participant_rules <- function(df, row) {
  
  acc_cut <- if (!is.na(row$P_accuracy)) as.numeric(sub("%","", row$P_accuracy)) / 100 else NULL
  perf_cut <- if (!is.na(row$P_performance)) as.numeric(sub("%","", row$P_performance)) / 100 else NULL
  rtvar_cut <- if (!is.na(row$P_rtvar)) as.numeric(sub("%","", row$P_rtvar)) / 100 else NULL
  min_trials <- if (!is.na(row$P_numtrials)) as.numeric(row$P_numtrials) else NULL
  
  exclude <- mark_participant_exclusions(
    df,
    acc_cut = acc_cut,
    min_trials = min_trials,
    perf_percent = perf_cut,
    rtvar_percent = rtvar_cut
  )
  
  df %>% mutate(exclude_participant = exclude)
}

apply_trial_rules_no_z <- function(df, row) {
  
  if (row$T_type == "bounds_rt" || row$T_type == "bounds_rt+z") {
    
    rt_min <- as.numeric(row$T_lower_rt)
    rt_max <- as.numeric(row$T_upper_rt)
    
    exclude <- mark_trial_exclusions(df,
                                     rt_min = rt_min,
                                     rt_max = rt_max)
  }
  
  else if (row$T_type == "bounds_percent" || row$T_type == "bounds_percent+z") {
    
    lower <- as.numeric(sub("%","", row$T_lower_pct)) / 100
    upper <- 1 - (as.numeric(sub("%","", row$T_upper_pct)) / 100)
    
    exclude <- mark_trial_exclusions(df,
                                     lower_bound = lower,
                                     upper_bound = upper)
  }
  
  else {
    exclude <- rep(FALSE, nrow(df))
  }
  
  df %>% mutate(exclude_trial = exclude)
}

apply_stimulus_rules <- function(df, row) {
  
  min_item_n <- if (!is.na(row$S_sample_size)) as.numeric(row$S_sample_size) else NULL
  min_item_acc <- if (!is.na(row$S_accuracy)) as.numeric(sub("%","", row$S_accuracy)) / 100 else NULL
  min_item_rank <- if (!is.na(row$S_lower_acc_trim)) as.numeric(sub("%","", row$S_lower_acc_trim)) / 100 else NULL
  
  exclude <- mark_stimulus_exclusions(
    df,
    min_item_n = min_item_n,
    min_item_acc = min_item_acc,
    min_item_rank = min_item_rank
  )
  
  df %>% mutate(exclude_stimulus = exclude)
}
```

### Priming

```{r}
compute_priming <- function(df) {
  
  # -------------------------------------------------
  # Use precomputed pairing
  # -------------------------------------------------
  
  pair_df <- df %>%
    arrange(observation, fix_sender) %>% 
    group_by(observation, pair_id) %>%
    mutate(which = row_number()) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols = c(observation, pair_id),
      names_from = which,
      values_from = c(word, class, correct,
                      original_duration, rt_z, exclude_all)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(word_1) & !is.na(word_2))
  
  # Keep only word-word pairs
  pair_df <- pair_df %>%
    filter(class_1 == "word" & class_2 == "word")
  
  # Rename for clarity
  pair_df <- pair_df %>%
    transmute(
      observation = observation,
      cue_word = word_1,
      cue_type = class_1,
      cue_correct = correct_1,
      
      target_word = word_2,
      target_type = class_2,
      target_correct = correct_2,
      target_rt = original_duration_2,
      target_rt_z = rt_z_2,
      target_exclude = exclude_all_2
    )
  
  # mark related and unrelated trials 
  pair_df$word_combo <- paste0(pair_df$cue_word, pair_df$target_word)
  
  # add if it's related or unrelated
  de_stimuli$word_combo <- paste0(de_stimuli$de_cue, de_stimuli$de_target)
  pair_df <- merge(pair_df, de_stimuli[ , c("type", "word_combo")], 
                   by = "word_combo", all.x = T)
  
  total_rows <- nrow(pair_df)
  number_exclude <- sum(pair_df$target_exclude, na.rm = T)
  # Remove rows marked for exclusion at target level
  pair_df <- pair_df %>%
    filter(!target_exclude)
  
  number_parts <- length(unique(pair_df$observation))
  
  # ---------------------------------
  # Compute mean Z by target × type
  # ---------------------------------
  
  average_priming <- pair_df %>% 
    group_by(target_word, type, word_combo) %>% 
    summarise(
      mean_target_rt_z = mean(target_rt_z, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%  
    arrange(target_word, type) %>% 
    group_by(type) %>% 
    mutate(target_word = make.unique(target_word)) %>% 
    select(-word_combo) %>% 
    ungroup() %>% 
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = type,
      values_from = mean_target_rt_z
    ) %>% 
    mutate(
      priming_z = unrelated - related
    )
  
  # ---------------------------------
  # Final summary (average over targets)
  # ---------------------------------
  
  final_summary <- average_priming %>% 
    summarise(
      mean_priming_z = mean(priming_z, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_priming_z = sd(priming_z, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_targets = sum(!is.na(priming_z)),
      number_parts = number_parts, 
      total_rows = total_rows,
      number_exclude = number_exclude
    )
  
  return(final_summary)
}
```

## Data

```{r eval = T}
de_trials <- read.csv("de_trial_data.csv.gz")
de_people <- read.csv("de_participant_data.csv")
de_stimuli <- read.csv("de_words.csv")

dat <- de_trials %>% 
  left_join(
    de_people %>% 
      select(observation, n_trials, n_correct, p_correct)
  ) %>% 
  select(-keep, -keep_participant, -keep_participant_answered, -c(time_run:time_switch), -duration, -Z_RT)

# -------------------------------------------------
# Precompute deterministic pairing ONCE
# -------------------------------------------------

dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(observation, fix_sender) %>%
  group_by(observation) %>%
  mutate(pair_id = ceiling(row_number() / 2)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Drop incomplete (orphan) pairs once globally

dat <- dat %>%
  group_by(observation, pair_id) %>%
  filter(n() == 2) %>%
  ungroup()
```

## Calculate Participant Variables

```{r}
# accuracy --> original version --> p_correct
# number of trials --> n_trials 
# data based performance cut off --> perf_rank
# data based RT variability cut off --> rt_rank

dat <- dat %>%
  group_by(observation) %>%
  mutate(
    rt_sd = sd(original_duration, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    perf_rank = percent_rank(p_correct),
    rt_rank   = percent_rank(rt_sd)
  )
```

## Calculate Trial Variables

```{r}
# lower bound --> original_duration
# upper bound --> original_duration
# lower bound percent --> rt_trial_rank
# upper bound percent --> rt_trial_rank
# z-score will be based on what was run above 

dat <- dat %>% 
  mutate(rt_trial_rank = percent_rank(original_duration))
```

## Calculate Stimuli Variables

```{r}
# item accuracy --> p_item_correct
# item sample size --> n_item_correct
# item bound accuracy --> item_rank
dat <- dat %>%
  group_by(word) %>%
  summarise(
    n_item_total = n(),
    n_item_correct = sum(correct == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_item_correct = n_item_correct / n_item_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    item_rank = percent_rank(p_item_correct)
  ) %>%
  right_join(dat, by = "word")
```

## What to Run?

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# PARTICIPANTS
# -----------------------------

participants <- bind_rows(

  tibble(P_type = "none"),

  expand_grid(P_type = "accuracy",
              P_accuracy = c("75%", "80%", "85%")),

  expand_grid(P_type = "performance",
              P_performance = c("5%", "10%")),

  expand_grid(P_type = "accuracy+numtrials",
              P_accuracy = c("75%", "80%", "85%"),
              P_numtrials = c("50", "100")),

  expand_grid(P_type = "accuracy+rtvar",
              P_accuracy = c("75%", "80%", "85%"),
              P_rtvar = c("5%", "10%")),

  expand_grid(P_type = "performance+numtrials",
              P_performance = c("5%", "10%"),
              P_numtrials = c("50", "100")),

  expand_grid(P_type = "performance+rtvar",
              P_performance = c("5%", "10%"),
              P_rtvar = c("5%", "10%"))
)

# -----------------------------
# TRIALS
# -----------------------------

trials <- bind_rows(

  tibble(T_type = "none"),

  expand_grid(T_type = "bounds_rt",
              T_lower_rt = c("100", "160", "200"),
              T_upper_rt = c("3000", "2500")),

  expand_grid(T_type = "bounds_percent",
              T_lower_pct = c("5%", "10%"),
              T_upper_pct = c("5%", "10%")),

  expand_grid(T_type = "bounds_rt+z",
              T_lower_rt = c("100", "160", "200"),
              T_upper_rt = c("3000", "2500"),
              T_z = c("2.5", "3.0")),

  expand_grid(T_type = "bounds_percent+z",
              T_lower_pct = c("5%", "10%"),
              T_upper_pct = c("5%", "10%"),
              T_z = c("2.5", "3.0"))
)

# -----------------------------
# STIMULI
# -----------------------------

stimuli <- bind_rows(

  tibble(S_type = "none"),

  expand_grid(S_type = "accuracy",
              S_accuracy = c("25%", "50%")),

  expand_grid(S_type = "lower_bound_accuracy",
              S_lower_acc_trim = c("5%", "10%")),

  expand_grid(S_type = "accuracy+sample",
              S_accuracy = c("25%", "50%"),
              S_sample_size = c("30", "50")),

  expand_grid(S_type = "lower_bound_accuracy+sample",
              S_lower_acc_trim = c("5%", "10%"),
              S_sample_size = c("30", "50"))
)

# -----------------------------
# FULL STRUCTURED GRID
# -----------------------------

grid <- crossing(participants, trials, stimuli)

nrow(grid)
# ~10,478 specifications

write.csv(grid, "structured_multiverse_grid.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

### Run Grid

```{r}
run_multiverse_chunk <- function(start_i, end_i, chunk_id) {
  
  results <- map_dfr(
    start_i:end_i,
    function(i) {
      
      row <- grid[i, ]
      df <- dat
      
      # 1. Participants
      df <- apply_participant_rules(df, row)
      
      # 2. Stimuli
      df <- apply_stimulus_rules(df, row)
      
      # 3. Trials (non-Z)
      df <- apply_trial_rules_no_z(df, row)
      
      # 4. Combine exclusions
      df <- df %>%
        mutate(
          exclude_participant = coalesce(exclude_participant, FALSE),
          exclude_trial = coalesce(exclude_trial, FALSE),
          exclude_stimulus = coalesce(exclude_stimulus, FALSE)
        )
      
      # 5. Compute Z
      df <- df %>%
        group_by(observation) %>%
        mutate(
          z_mean = mean(original_duration[correct == TRUE & !exclude_trial], na.rm = TRUE),
          z_sd   = sd(original_duration[correct == TRUE & !exclude_trial], na.rm = TRUE),
          rt_z   = (original_duration - z_mean) / z_sd
        ) %>%
        ungroup() %>%
        select(-z_mean, -z_sd)
      
      # 5b. Z exclusion
      if (!is.null(row$T_z) && !is.na(row$T_z)) {
        z_cut <- as.numeric(row$T_z)
        df <- df %>% mutate(exclude_z = abs(rt_z) > z_cut)
      } else {
        df <- df %>% mutate(exclude_z = FALSE)
      }
      
      # 6. Final exclusion flag
      df <- df %>%
        mutate(
          exclude_all = exclude_participant |
                        exclude_trial |
                        exclude_stimulus |
                        exclude_z |
                        !correct |
                        is.na(correct)
        )
      
      # 7. Priming
      priming <- compute_priming(df)
      
      bind_cols(row, priming)
    }
  )
  
  filename <- paste0("data/multiverse_chunk_", chunk_id, ".csv")
  write.csv(results, filename, row.names = FALSE)
  
  return(results)
}

chunk_size <- 20
total_specs <- nrow(grid)

starts <- seq(1, total_specs, by = chunk_size)
ends   <- pmin(starts + chunk_size - 1, total_specs)

for (k in seq_along(starts)) {
  run_multiverse_chunk(starts[k], ends[k], paste0("F_", k))
  cat("Forward:", starts[k], "\n")
}
```

```{r}
# total participants 
length(unique(dat$observation))
```

## Combine Results

```{r}
files <- list.files(
  path = "data",
  pattern = "multiverse_chunk_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

all_results <- files %>%
  map_dfr(read.csv) %>% 
  distinct(across(colnames(grid)), .keep_all = TRUE)

write.csv(all_results, "multiverse_results.csv")
```
